name: Trinidad Coloniales
description: The Trinidad Coloniales is an elegant medium-strength corona that showcases the brand's hallmark refinement and complexity. Honey sweetness mingles with delicate cedar and floral notes in a beautifully balanced smoke.

name: Trinidad Robustos T
description: The Trinidad Robustos T is a limited-edition gem that packs the brand's signature elegance into a satisfying robusto format. Its thick ring gauge delivers creamy, honeyed complexity with subtle floral notes throughout.

name: Trinidad Shorts
description: The Trinidad Shorts offers a quick but wholly satisfying smoke that distills the brand's creamy, honey-driven character into a compact format. Perfect for those who want the Trinidad experience without committing to a long session.

name: Trinidad Topes
description: The Trinidad Topes is a rare limited-release torpedo widely considered one of the finest Cubans produced in the modern era. Its tapered head focuses an extraordinary concentration of honey, cedar, and floral complexity.

name: Hoyo de Monterrey Epicure No. 1
description: The Hoyo de Monterrey Epicure No. 1 is a graceful mild-to-medium corona gorda delivering silky cream, gentle hay, and delicate cedar notes. It is widely regarded as one of the most approachable yet refined Cubans available.

name: Hoyo de Monterrey Palmas Extra
description: The Hoyo de Monterrey Palmas Extra is a slender, elegant lonsdale offering a long, leisurely mild smoke. Its narrow ring gauge emphasizes delicate cedar and hay notes with a creamy finish.

name: Hoyo No. 4
description: The Hoyo No. 4 is a classic mareva-format cigar in the mild range, beloved by those who appreciate understated Cuban elegance. Creamy cedar and gentle hay notes make it an ideal everyday smoke.

name: Le Hoyo des Dieux
description: Le Hoyo des Dieux is a limited-release corona that steps up the Hoyo de Monterrey profile with added earthiness and medium body. It is a special find for aficionados who want more complexity than the standard mild lineup.

name: Fonseca KDT Cadetes
description: The Fonseca KDT Cadetes is a gentle, affordable Cuban mareva that exemplifies the brand's light and creamy house style. Delicate floral and hay nuances make it a pleasant, undemanding smoke for any time of day.

name: Fonseca Delicias
description: The Fonseca Delicias is a long, slender dalias that rewards patient smokers with an evolving floral and cedar character. True to the Fonseca name, it remains light and refined from first light to final third.

name: Fonseca Invictos
description: The Fonseca Invictos is a slightly stouter corona extra that adds a touch of vanilla sweetness to the brand's classic cream and cedar base. A mild and accessible cigar that works well for novice and veteran smokers alike.

name: San Cristóbal El Castillo
description: San Cristóbal El Castillo is a medium-bodied toro that brings together earthy Cuban terroir with cedar, leather, and a hint of coffee. Named after one of Havana's historic fortresses, it delivers a solid and satisfying smoke.

name: San Cristóbal La Punta
description: San Cristóbal La Punta is a tapered torpedo that concentrates the brand's earthy, medium-bodied character into an expressive and complex smoke. The pointed head allows the flavors to develop gradually, rewarding the patient smoker.

name: San Cristóbal Quinteto
description: The San Cristóbal Quinteto is a well-constructed robusto delivering the brand's characteristic earthiness in a shorter, more focused format. Coffee and leather undertones round out a pleasing medium-strength profile.

name: El Rey del Mundo Grandes de España
description: The El Rey del Mundo Grandes de España is a mild gran corona with an exceptionally smooth, creamy character that made the brand famous. Cedar and hay notes drift pleasantly through a long, relaxed draw.

name: El Rey del Mundo Coronas de Luxe
description: The Coronas de Luxe is a long, slender lonsdale that typifies El Rey del Mundo's mild and graceful house character. Hints of vanilla accompany the cedar and hay backbone for a refined, effortless smoke.

name: El Rey del Mundo Lunch Club No. 2
description: The Lunch Club No. 2 lives up to its name as a perfect midday indulgence — mild, creamy, and easy-going with a pleasant cedar and hay character. It is an unassuming but genuinely enjoyable everyday Cuban.

name: Vegas Robaina Clásicos
description: The Vegas Robaina Clásicos is a punchy medium-to-full robusto that honors the legendary tobacco grower Alejandro Robaina and his Vuelta Abajo fields. Earthy pepper and leather notes define a bold and satisfying smoke.

name: Vegas Robaina Señores
description: Vegas Robaina Señores is a full-length dalias that showcases the brand's trademark intensity across a long, rewarding smoke. Deep earth, leather, and coffee notes build from start to finish in a deeply satisfying progression.

name: Cuaba Exclusivos
description: The Cuaba Exclusivos is a classically shaped figurado with a tapered foot that delivers layers of cedar, earth, and spice. Cuaba's dedication to traditional Cuban perfecto shapes makes this corona gorda a distinctive experience.

name: Cuaba Generosos
description: The Cuaba Generosos is a compact figurado-style robusto that tapers at both ends for an evocative traditional presentation. Cedar and spice dominate with a creamy undertone that softens the medium-bodied profile.

name: Cuaba Salomones
description: The Cuaba Salomones is a rare limited-release double figurado — tapered at both ends — widely praised as one of the most complex and rewarding Cubans in the Cuaba portfolio. The massive ring gauge allows flavors of cedar, earth, and spice to evolve beautifully over a long session.

name: Vegueros Tainos
description: Vegueros Tainos is a mild, slender corona that offers a gentle introduction to Cuban tobacco's natural hay and floral character. Affordable and well-made, it is an excellent everyday cigar for those who prefer lighter flavors.

name: Vegueros Especiales No. 1
description: The Vegueros Especiales No. 1 steps up from the brand's lighter offerings with a medium-bodied profile featuring cedar, earth, and a pleasant spice kick. A great value cigar that punches above its price point.

name: Vegueros Entretiempos
description: The Vegueros Entretiempos is a short, mild smoke designed for in-between moments — a coffee break or a brief outdoor pause. Its gentle hay and cream flavors make it one of the most approachable and budget-friendly Cuban cigars.

name: Juan López Selección Suprema
description: Juan López Selección Suprema is a well-proportioned toro that delivers a consistently medium-bodied smoke with earthy Cuban character. Cedar and coffee notes weave through the experience with a satisfying leathery finish.

name: Juan López Coronas de Lomo
description: The Juan López Coronas de Lomo is a long, elegant lonsdale that draws out the brand's earthy and cedary Cuban character over a leisurely smoke. An underrated gem for those who seek honest, no-frills Cuban quality.

name: Ramón Allones Club Allones
description: The Ramón Allones Club Allones is a robustly flavored medium-to-full robusto that showcases the brand's characteristic punch and complexity. Deep earth, pepper, and coffee build through the smoke to a satisfying leathery finale.

name: Ramón Allones Ramonitas
description: Ramón Allones Ramonitas is a slender cigarillo that offers a quick and affordable taste of the storied brand. Despite its small ring gauge, it delivers a pleasant cedar and hay character that stands apart from the brand's fuller siblings.

name: Ramón Allones Phoenixes
description: The limited-edition Ramón Allones Phoenixes is a gran corona that rises to the top of the brand's lineup with exceptional depth of earth, pepper, and leather. A truly full-flavored Cuban that rewards those who appreciate assertive, complex smokes.

name: Sancho Panza Coronas
description: The Sancho Panza Coronas is a mild, smooth corona with a creamy and hay-forward profile that keeps it approachable and pleasant. Like the literary character it is named after, this cigar is cheerful, unpretentious, and easy to enjoy.

name: Sancho Panza Molinos
description: The Sancho Panza Molinos is a long dalias format that steps up the brand's typical mildness to a medium-bodied profile with earthy, cedary depth. Named after the windmills of Don Quixote fame, it is a thoughtful cigar for a contemplative mood.

name: Sancho Panza Bachilleres
description: The Sancho Panza Bachilleres is a mild, thin panetela designed for quick enjoyment without sacrificing authentic Cuban character. Hay and cream notes dominate in this affordable and unassuming smoke.

name: Quai d'Orsay No. 50
description: The Quai d'Orsay No. 50 is a smooth, elegant corona gorda with a wider ring gauge that enhances the brand's signature creaminess and vanilla sweetness. One of the most refined mild Cuban cigars available, it was originally blended for the French market.

name: Quai d'Orsay Senadores
description: The Quai d'Orsay Senadores is a petite, aromatic mild corona with the French-inspired house focus on cream and floral elegance. A wonderful short smoke for those who appreciate delicate Cuban flavors without intensity.

name: Quai d'Orsay No. 54
description: The Quai d'Orsay No. 54 is a thick toro that amplifies the brand's creamy and vanilla-laden profile to a luxurious degree. Originally produced as a French exclusive, it has garnered international acclaim for its silky elegance.

name: Rafael González Coronas Extra
description: The Rafael González Coronas Extra is a mild corona extra with a classic, understated Cuban profile of cedar, cream, and gentle hay. This brand, founded with endorsement from Cuban legend Ramón Allones, produces reliably clean and pleasant smokes.

name: Rafael González Lonsdale
description: The Rafael González Lonsdale is a long, elegant vitola that allows the brand's mild flavors to develop gracefully from cedar and hay to a gentle earthiness. A classic Cuban lonsdale for connoisseurs who appreciate restraint and refinement.

name: Rafael González Panetela Extras
description: The Rafael González Panetela Extras is a slim, mild panetela offering a quick but elegant smoke full of hay and floral notes. Its narrow ring gauge keeps the flavors crisp and focused throughout a brief, pleasant session.

name: Por Larrañaga Montecarlos
description: Por Larrañaga Montecarlos is a classic medium-bodied lonsdale from one of Havana's oldest brands, offering cream, cedar, and earth in a long and enjoyable format. The house style rewards patient smokers who appreciate gradual complexity.

name: Por Larrañaga Picadores
description: The Por Larrañaga Picadores is a compact short robusto that concentrates the brand's earthy, cedary medium-body into a satisfying shorter smoke. A dependable cigar that highlights the historic brand's consistent quality.

name: Por Larrañaga Galanes
description: The Por Larrañaga Galanes is a long, medium-bodied dalias that gives the brand's characteristic blend of cedar, earth, and cream plenty of room to develop. Excellent for an evening session when time allows for thoughtful appreciation.

name: Diplomaticos No. 3
description: Diplomaticos No. 3 is a medium-bodied corona that shares its blend with the Montecristo range yet offers a distinctive and often more affordable Cuban experience. Earth, cedar, and coffee blend into a smooth and gratifying smoke.

name: Diplomaticos No. 4
description: Diplomaticos No. 4 packs the brand's medium-bodied character into a shorter petit corona format perfect for a post-lunch smoke. Earthy Cuban terroir and cream provide a balanced and satisfying experience in under an hour.

name: Diplomaticos No. 5
description: Diplomaticos No. 5 is the longest vitola in the range, a full-length dalias that allows the blend's earthiness and cedar to develop into leather and coffee notes across an extended smoke. A superb value for lovers of extended Cuban sessions.

name: La Flor de Caño Short Churchill
description: The La Flor de Caño Short Churchill is a medium-bodied robusto that brings honest earthy and cedary Cuban character at an accessible price point. A workhorse cigar from one of Havana's lesser-known but reliable brands.

name: La Flor de Caño Preferidos
description: La Flor de Caño Preferidos is a mild and gentle corona that showcases the brand's light, hay-forward house style. Creamy and floral notes keep it approachable, making it a fine choice for the beginning Cuban explorer.

name: Saint Luis Rey Du Connoisseur No. 1
description: The Saint Luis Rey Du Connoisseur No. 1 is a full-bodied robusto delivering a powerful punch of earth, pepper, and leather that has earned it a loyal following among lovers of assertive Cubans. A deeply satisfying smoke for those who want intensity in a shorter format.

name: Saint Luis Rey Regios
description: The Saint Luis Rey Regios is a compact minuto that packs the brand's bold earthy and peppery character into a short, punchy smoke. Ideal when time is limited but quality is non-negotiable.

name: Quintero No. 2
description: Quintero No. 2 is one of Cuba's most affordable and accessible everyday cigars, producing a gentle mild-to-medium smoke with hay, cedar, and cream notes. An honest Cuban panetela that delivers real value without pretension.

name: Quintero Panetelas
description: Quintero Panetelas is a slender, mild Cuban smoke that keeps its price firmly on the budget end while delivering genuine Havana character. Hay and cream flavors make it one of the most approachable entry points into Cuban cigars.

name: José L. Piedra Conservas
description: José L. Piedra Conservas is one of Cuba's most rustic and wallet-friendly smokes, offering a medium-bodied short corona with earthy and peppery punch. Its unpretentious character makes it a favorite among those who want a no-frills Cuban experience.

name: José L. Piedra Cazadores
description: José L. Piedra Cazadores is a full-bodied Cuban lonsdale that delivers a bold, earthy, and peppery smoke at one of the lowest price points among Cuban lonsdales. A rugged cigar for enthusiasts who appreciate raw Cuban strength.

name: Punch Corona
description: The Punch Corona is a dependable medium-to-full Cuban corona with an earthy, leathery character and a pleasant spice finish. One of the brand's most approachable vitolas, it delivers the punchy Punch house profile in a convenient format.

name: Punch Superiores
description: Punch Superiores is a medium-bodied panetela that delivers the brand's earthy and spicy character in a slender, elegant format. The thinner gauge keeps each puff crisp and defined, making it an enjoyable session for those who prefer a lighter draw.
